推荐场景: 酒店前台｜综合入住、房间、早餐、退房
60秒任务: 「酒店 Boss」：入住/房间/服务时间确认；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 入住｜房间信息｜服务时间｜小问题｜礼貌请求
场景族: 酒店前台｜房间｜早餐区｜机场｜旅行服务台
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I have a booking for ___ nights.（预订信息）
Can I check in now, or should I wait?（入住/等待）
My room is ready, but the key card doesn’t work.（房间+问题）
What time does breakfast start tomorrow?（早餐时间）
I need a quiet room because I have an early flight.（原因）
There is no hot water in my room.（房间问题）
Can someone check the Wi-Fi?（网络求助）
Can I leave my bags after check-out?（退房后寄存）
Please check the bill again.（核对账单）
Could you repeat the room number?（请求重复）
The elevator is over there, right?（确认方向）
Can you call a taxi to the airport?（叫车）
I left my phone in the room.（遗失物品）
Thank you, that solves the problem.（完成）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: booking, room, key card, breakfast, Wi-Fi, bill, taxi, airport, flight, bag, phone
Verbs: check in, check out, wait, repeat, fix, leave, call, pay
Adjectives: quiet, ready, broken, early, included, extra
Time / Place: tomorrow, after check-out, at the front desk, in the room, airport
Chunks: early flight, room number, no hot water, check the bill, leave bags
